# Market.knight

> Precision. Structure. Execution. A professional ICT-inspired trading command center for futures, forex, crypto, indices, and stocks — helping traders identify premium/discount zones, liquidity, market sessions, and manage risk.

Market.knight is a dark-themed trading toolkit built for traders who follow ICT (Inner Circle Trader) concepts. It provides real-time calculators, screen marker alerts, kill zone tracking, educational quizzes, and a trade journal — all designed for mobile and desktop use with persistent local storage.

## Pages

- [Level Calculator](/): Calculate premium, discount, and equilibrium levels for any asset with price-action inputs.
- [ICT Command Center](/ict): Swing-based premium/discount zones, kill zone dashboard with session countdowns, liquidity scanner (BSL/SSL), daily bias panel, and pre-trade checklist.
- [Risk Calculator](/risk): Position sizing, dollar risk, R:R ratio, and exact stop/target planning.
- [Screen Marker Alerts](/alerts): Multi-asset price level alerts with visual flash, audio beeps, pre-trade checklist popups, and alert logging.
- [Session Planner](/sessions): Schedule, track, and review trading sessions with notes and performance tagging.
- [Trade Journal](/journal): Log trades with screenshots, tags, and review notes for continuous improvement.
- [Learn & Quiz](/learn): Interactive candlestick chart lessons on trend, BOS, CHOCH, and FVG with an 8-question quiz and cheat sheet.
